case_title: CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF WELLS FARGO VS. PHILIP F G WOO

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: WINN, BRIAN N SUBSTITUTED FOR BRACHFELD, ERICA L AS ATTORNEY FOR CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF WELLS FARGO BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF WELLS FARGO BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WOO, PHILIP F $4,104.83 PRINCIPAL, $1,971.90 INTEREST, $205.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,281.73, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT WOO, PHILIP F
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF WELLS FARGO BANK AS TO DEFENDANT WOO, PHILIP F G
